BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SCOTLAND.htm#Maldreddied1045A as of 3/11/2016

DUNCAN, son of --- (-killed 965).  Abthane of Dule, lay abbot of Dunkeld.  From the house of the Kings of Irel …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan於1038年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Duncan I King of Scotland37歲，母親Suthen29歲。他於1066年與Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray在英國英格蘭波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1094年11月12日在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金享年56歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan于1038年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Duncan I King of Scotland37岁，母亲Suthen29岁。他于1066年与Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray在英国英格兰波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1094年11月12日在苏格兰艾爾金爾埃爾金享年56岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan was born in 1038, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Duncan I King of Scotland, was 37 and his mother, Suthen, was 29. He married Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray in 1066, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 November 1094, in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 56, and was buried in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan est né en 1038, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Duncan I King of Scotland, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Suthen, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray en 1066, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1094, à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Sc: Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan 1038 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan I King of Scotland 37 und seine Mutter Suthen 29. Er hat 1066 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. November 1094 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan è nato il nel 1038 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Duncan I King of Scotland, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Suthen, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray nel 1066, nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 novembre 1094, nel Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncanが1038年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Duncan I King of Scotlandは37歳，母Suthenは29歳であった。1066年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドでOctreda De Allerdale countess of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1094年11月12日にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンで56歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインダンフエルムライン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Duncan(이)가 1038년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan I King of Scotland(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Suthen(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1066년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드에서 Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1094년 11월 12일 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan nasceu em 1038, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Duncan I King of Scotland, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Suthen, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray em 1066, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1094, em Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Sc: дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan родился в 1038 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Duncan I King of Scotland было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Suthen, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray в 1066 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 ноября 1094 г. в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duncan nació en 1038, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Duncan I King of Scotland, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Suthen, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray en 1066, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1094, en Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
